ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the store */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager (redundant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the day */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the active promotion */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the active coupon */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card, debit card) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_coupon_id FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_id") REFERENCES coupons ("coupon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion (e.g., all customers, new customers) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the promotion */,
  "expected_sales_increase" REAL /* Expected percentage increase in sales due to the promotion */,
  "actual_sales_increase" REAL /* Actual percentage increase in sales due to the promotion */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupons" (
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount or percentage */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the coupon's validity */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the coupon's validity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coupon */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the coupon can be used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the coupon has been used */,
  "minimum_purchase" REAL /* Minimum purchase amount required to use the coupon */,
  "valid_for_products" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of product IDs or categories for which the coupon is valid */,
  "coupon_type" TEXT /* Type of coupon (e.g., percentage off, fixed amount off) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store being rated */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score (1-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Customer comments or feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the rating */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who served the customer */,
  "rating_context" TEXT /* Context of the rating (e.g., product quality, customer service) */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "rating_status" TEXT /* Status of the rating (e.g., reviewed, unreviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_ratings_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_ratings_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product based on customer reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store managed by the manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "manager_status" TEXT /* Status of the manager (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, regional manager, corporate analyst) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., sales data, customer ratings) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
